prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your sustainable living forward
items: Calculate your current household carbon footprint using an online calculator
Conduct a home energy audit by walking through each room and documenting current energy usage
Research and identify 5 local sustainable businesses to support in your community
Create a comprehensive household inventory of all products you currently use and consume
Research and compare 3 different renewable energy options available in your area
Create a sustainable living budget that tracks both financial and environmental costs of your purchases
